title: China's Xi Jinping reveals grand development plan for Central Asia at summit
description: China stands ready to synergise development strategies with the five Central Asian nations of Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan and Uzbekistan.
keywords: Xi Jinping, China, G7, China-Central Asia Summit, Central Asia
